sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97781" key="sugkerasto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκερ-αστός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n97781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tempered by mixing</tr_>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ς</foreign>. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a mixed drink, aqua calda</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
